## Scope

- [ ] Documentation-only change
- [ ] Agent file update
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Checklist or supporting docs update

## Validation

- [ ] Confirmed expected file structure
- [ ] Reviewed Markdown headings and formatting
- [ ] Confirmed no dependencies, build tooling, generated artifacts, or application code were added

## Public OSS Hygiene Checklist

- [ ] No private AI session links or shared conversation URLs
- [ ] No local machine paths
- [ ] No generated-by signatures
- [ ] No private tool metadata
- [ ] No internal-only notes
